div.t-att-class: { 'selected': props.state.selectedNodeIds.includes(props.node.id), 'filtered-out': props.isFiltered, 'linking-target': props.state.linkingNodeId and props.state.linkingNodeId !== props.node.id, 'linking-source': props.state.linkingNodeId === props.node.id, 'type-company': props.node.type === 'company', 'type-individual': props.node.type === 'individual', 'type-trust': props.node.type === 'trust', 'type-fund': props.node.type === 'fund', 'type-gov': props.node.type === 'gov', 'type-asset': props.node.type === 'asset' }

div.class: node-content-wrapper w-100 h-100 d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-center position-relative
floating-toolbar position-absolute shadow bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded d-flex align-items-center px-1
div.style: top: -45px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 50; gap: 4px; pointer-events: auto;

div.class: tool-btn btn btn-sm btn-light border-0 py-1 text-slate-600 bg-white hover-bg-slate-50
tool-btn btn btn-sm btn-light border-0 border-start py-1 text-slate-600 bg-white hover-bg-slate-50 rounded-0
tool-btn btn btn-sm btn-light border-0 border-start py-1 text-danger bg-white hover-bg-red-50 rounded-0
tool-btn btn btn-sm btn-light border-0 border-start py-1 text-slate-600 bg-white hover-bg-slate-50 rounded-0
position-absolute bg-white rounded-circle shadow-sm border border-slate-200 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center cursor-pointer
bg-indigo-500 rounded-circle text-white fw-bold d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center
position-absolute bg-white shadow-lg border border-slate-300 rounded p-1 d-flex align-items-center
div.style: width: 240px; top: 0px; right: -250px; z-index: 60; pointer-events: auto;

div.class: bg-indigo-500 rounded-circle text-white fw-bold d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center me-2 ms-1

input.class: form-control form-control-sm border-0 shadow-none px-1 h-100
